title: Paarvai Undhan Lyrics Nil Gavani Sellathey Song lyrics
stanzas:
Singers: Vasundhara Das, Sricharan
Song: Paarvai Undhan
Movie : Nil Gavani Sellathey
Lyrics : Na Muthukumar

Thozhil un thozhil nan sayum anneram
Nenjil en nenjil perinbam undagum
Anbe un anbil nan vazhum inneram
Ayyo ippodhey sethaalum santhosam

Paarvai Undhan paarvai, kulir eeram adhu porvai
Un kangal en kannil vandhu kadhal solla

Let me take you in my arms
Dont you know that i am a charm
Got to taste that mood a ride
Get my ring and be my queen

Vaarthai undhan vaarthai
Adhu vaarthai illai vazhkai
Un kaigal enkaiyil vandhu vetpam solla

Cant live without my soul
i know my love is gold
Your love never gets old

Un perai sollum podhey edho mayakkam
Kanmoodi solli parthaen dhinandhorum
Un kobam konjam unndu adada enakkum
Un munbu kobam kooda parandhodum

Thozhil un thozhil nan sayum anneram
Nenjil en nenjil perinbam undagum
Anbe un anbil nan vazhum inneram
Ayyo ippodhey sethaalum santhosam

He is me last word
That has to be her
Wont you give me a life
Just be my wife
Let me take you in my arms
Dont you know that i am a charm
Got to taste that mood a ride
Get my ring and be my queen

Cant live without my soul
i know my love is gold
Your love never gets old

Unnodu pesapesa neram innikum
Silaneram mounam kooda azhagagum
Un meedhu asaipatu idhayam thudikkum
Un munbu acham nanam thadumarum

Unnal nan unnal kathadi polahnen
Munnal un munnal aengengo nan ponen
Illai ne illai endral nan ennaven
Ayyo appodhey angae nan saven

Paarvai Undhan paarvai, kulir eeram adhu porvai
Un kangal en kannil vandhu kadhal solla

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Paarvai Undhan?

The song expresses deep romantic feelings and the joy of being in love, highlighting the beauty of connection between two souls.

In which movie is Paarvai Undhan featured?

The song is featured in the movie Nil Gavani Sellathey.

Who are the singers of Paarvai Undhan?

The song is sung by Sricharan and Vasundhra Das.

Who composed the music for Paarvai Undhan?

The music for the song was composed by Selvaganesh.

When was Paarvai Undhan released?

The song was released on August 22, 2010.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Paarvai Undhan, the characters express their love and affection in a tender and heartfelt manner. The song serves as a backdrop to romantic moments in Nil Gavani Sellathey, enhancing the emotional depth of the narrative. With its soothing melody and beautiful lyrics by Na Muthukumar, it evokes feelings of warmth and joy. The collaboration between Sricharan and Vasundhra Das adds a unique charm, making it a memorable romantic duet.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Paarvai Undhan from Nil Gavani Sellathey beautifully captures the essence of romance with its enchanting melodies. The collaboration between the soulful voices of Sricharan and Vasundhra Das, paired with Selvaganesh's captivating music, creates a magical listening experience. This song is a heartfelt expression of love that resonates deeply with anyone who has ever been in love.
stanzaMeanings: Your work is my work, and one day my heart will be filled with joy. My love, I will live in your love. Oh, even today, happiness is here.
Your gaze, that coolness, is a blessing. Your eyes come to me to express love.
Let me take you in my arms. Don't you know that I am charming? I want to enjoy that feeling. Get my ring and be my queen.
Your words are your words, but they are not life. Your hands come to me to express pain.
I can't live without my soul; I know my love is precious. Your love never ages.
When you say your name, there is some magic. I saw your eyes and felt something. Your anger is a little bit there, and even in front of you, my anger can fly away.
Your work is my work, and one day my heart will be filled with joy. My love, I will live in your love. Oh, even today, happiness is here.
Like your eyes, yes, I will live with you.

He is my last word; that has to be her. Won't you give me a life? Just be my wife. Let me take you in my arms. Don't you know that I am charming? I want to enjoy that feeling. Get my ring and be my queen.
I can't live without my soul; I know my love is precious. Your love never ages.
When I talk to you, even silence can be beautiful. My heart beats for you. In front of you, my fear and shyness disappear.
Because of you, I feel like I am flying. I went somewhere in the past. If you say no, then what will I become? Oh, then I will die there.
Like your eyes, yes, I will live with you.
Your gaze, that coolness, is a blessing. Your eyes come to me to express love.
